'''sangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:youngly|youngly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:youngly|youngly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sangate|sangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sangatesher|sangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sangatesherĂ«m|sangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sangatero|sangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sangateshĂ«|sangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sangateshĂ«m|sangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisangatero|gokisangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisangateshĂ«|gokisangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisangateshĂ«m|gokisangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosangankerom|gosangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosangankeshĂ«|gosangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosangankeshĂ«m|gosangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosangankeya|gosangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sangaterom|sangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sangatemu|sangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sangateya|sangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisangaterom|gokisangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisangatemu|gokisangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisangateya|gokisangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sangangate|sangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sangangatesher|sangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sangangatesherĂ«m|sangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sangangatero|sangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sangangateshĂ«|sangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sangangateshĂ«m|sangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisangangatero|gokisangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisangangateshĂ«|gokisangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisangangateshĂ«m|gokisangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosangangankerom|gosangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosangangankeshĂ«|gosangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosangangankeshĂ«m|gosangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosangangankeya|gosangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sangangaterom|sangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sangangatemu|sangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sangangateya|sangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisangangaterom|gokisangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisangangatemu|gokisangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisangangateya|gokisangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠngĂŠte|sĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠngĂŠtesher|sĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠngĂŠtero|sĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠngĂŠtero|gokisĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠngĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠngĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠngĂŠterom|sĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠngĂŠtemu|sĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠngĂŠteya|sĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠngĂŠterom|gokisĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠngĂŠteya|gokisĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safngafte|safngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safngaftesher|safngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safngaftesherĂ«m|safngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safngaftero|safngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safngafteshĂ«|safngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safngafteshĂ«m|safngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafngaftero|gokisafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafngafteshĂ«|gokisafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafngafteshĂ«m|gokisafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafngafnkerom|gosafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafngafnkeshĂ«|gosafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafngafnkeshĂ«m|gosafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafngafnkeya|gosafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safngafterom|safngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safngaftemu|safngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safngafteya|safngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafngafterom|gokisafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafngaftemu|gokisafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafngafteya|gokisafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
